rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task correctly. It followed the proper CockroachDB decommission sequence: decommissioned node 4 (crdb-cluster-4) with --wait=all until replicas drained to 0 (68→0), then decommissioned node 3 (crdb-cluster-3) similarly (52→0), then scaled the StatefulSet from 5→3. All three verification checks passed with evidence from the actual tool output: (1) node status shows exactly 3 live nodes (IDs 1, 2, 5), (2) StatefulSet reports 3/3 ready, (3) bench.decom_data SELECT count(*) returns 3 rows confirming no data loss. The oracle verdict is also 'pass'. The agent correctly decommissioned before scaling (the safe order), used --wait=all to ensure replica drainage completed before pod termination, and worked around a kubectl version skew issue without violating any constraints.
